subject: [PATCH pynfs v3 05/26] server41tests: pass_warn() when server doesn't support dir delegations

2026-06-19.patch_summary: This patch modifies the server41tests to pass with a warning instead of failing when the server does not support directory delegations or when it fails to hand out a delegation. It also adds checks for non-fatal status codes and ensures that the correct notifications are offered by the server. The changes make it safe to keep the directory delegation tests in the 'all' group.
